examples: But above the treeline was a ridge skirting Heidi-style grazing land.
Maybe we're skirting rhetorical questions of that kind, but we're really not.
We recover somehow and have a slightly awkward chat about work and skirting around the events of the weekend.
Mr. GOLDSMITH: And even when he was skirting the law, he didn't do so in secret.
Then I noticed that the smoke was coming out from the skirting boards.
